title: Shri Gange Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Gange Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Ganga.
description:
Om Jai Gange Mata,
Shri Jai Gange Mata.
Jo nar tumko dhyata,
Manvanchit phal paata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

Chandra si jot tumhari,
Jal nirmal aata.
Sharan pade jo teri,
So nar tar jaata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

Putra Sagar ke tare,
Sab jag ko gyata.
Kripa drishti tumhari,
Tribhuvan sukh daata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

Ek hi baar jo teri,
Sharanagati aata.
Yam ki traas mita kar,
Paramgati paata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

Aarti maat tumhari,
Jo jan nitya gaata.
Daas vahi sahaj mein,
Mukti ko paata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of Ganga Mata's Aarti?
faq.a1: It is performed for the cleansing of sins and spiritual purification.
faq.q2: Which is the most auspicious day for worshipping Ganga Mata?
faq.a2: Ganga Dussehra and Purnima (Full Moon) dates.
faq.q3: What offerings (Prasad) are preferred for the Mother during Aarti?
faq.q4: Can Ganga Mata's Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, one can perform Aarti by treating a vessel of water as Ganga.
faq.q5: What should be done after the Aarti?
faq.a5: One should recite 'Ganga Chalisa' or 'Ganga Stotram'.
